args.query:
SELECT 
  ch.caseid__c,
  ch.newvalue__c as owner_id,
  ch.createddate as assignment_date,
  c.createddate as case_createddate,
  c.closeddate as case_closeddate,
  c.status as case_status
FROM casehistory__c ch
JOIN "Case" c ON ch.caseid__c = c.id
WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  AND c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
ORDER BY ch.caseid__c, ch.createddate

    caseid__c,
    COUNT(*) as owner_assignment_count
  FROM casehistory__c 
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
),

    c.id,

    c.closeddate::timestamp as closeddate

agent_case_counts AS (

    ownerid,

  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)

  ownerid as agent_id,
  case_count,
  avg_handle_time_hours
FROM agent_case_counts
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC

    TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM c.ownerid) as clean_ownerid,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
    AND c.status LIKE 'Closed%'
),
all_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM caseid__c) as case_id
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY caseid__c
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT 
  cc.clean_id as id,
  cc.clean_ownerid as ownerid,
  cc.createddate,
  cc.closeddate
FROM closed_cases cc

WHERE atc.case_id IS NULL
LIMIT 50

  SELECT 
    TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM c.id) as clean_id,
    TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM c.ownerid) as clean_ownerid,
    c.createddate::timestamp as createddate,
    c.closeddate::timestamp as closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'

    AND TRIM(c.status) LIKE 'Closed%'
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1

      WHERE TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM ch.caseid__c) = TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM c.id) 
        AND ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
      GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
      HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
    )
),
agent_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    clean_ownerid as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))/3600.0) as avg_handle_time_hours
  FROM non_transferred_cases
  GROUP BY clean_ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT 
  agent_id,
  case_count,
  avg_handle_time_hours
FROM agent_stats
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC

api_compatible_cases AS (
  SELECT 
    ownerid,
    createddate::text,
    closeddate::text,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate::timestamp - createddate::timestamp))/3600.0 as handle_time_hours
  FROM valid_cases
),
agent_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    ownerid as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count
  FROM api_compatible_cases
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT 
  acc.agent_id,
  acc.case_count,
  AVG(acc2.handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM agent_counts acc
JOIN api_compatible_cases acc2 ON acc.agent_id = acc2.ownerid
GROUP BY acc.agent_id, acc.case_count
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 10

    TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM c.ownerid) as clean_ownerid,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.closeddate != 'None'
    AND (c.status ILIKE 'Closed%' OR TRIM(c.status) = 'Closed')
),
transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM ch.caseid__c) as case_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner Assignment'
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),
valid_cases AS (
  SELECT 
    cc.clean_id as id,
    cc.clean_ownerid as ownerid,
    cc.createddate::timestamp as createddate,
    cc.closeddate::timestamp as closeddate
  FROM closed_cases cc
  WHERE cc.clean_id NOT IN (SELECT case_id FROM transferred_cases)
),
api_compatible_cases AS (
  SELECT 
    ownerid,
    createddate::text,
    closeddate::text,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate::timestamp - createddate::timestamp))/3600.0 as handle_time_hours
  FROM valid_cases
),
agent_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    ownerid as agent_id,
    COUNT(*) as case_count
  FROM api_compatible_cases
  GROUP BY ownerid
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT 
  acc.agent_id,
  acc.case_count,
  AVG(acc2.handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM agent_counts acc
JOIN api_compatible_cases acc2 ON acc.agent_id = acc2.ownerid
GROUP BY acc.agent_id, acc.case_count
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
LIMIT 10

args.query:
-- Find agents who handled more than one case (including open)
-- And check their closed case handle times
WITH agent_cases AS (
  SELECT 
    TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM c.id) as case_id,
    TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM c.ownerid) as owner_id,
    c.createddate::timestamp as createddate,
    c.closeddate::timestamp as closeddate,
    c.status
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.createddate >= '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate <= '2023-09-02'
),
agents_with_multiple_cases AS (
  SELECT owner_id
  FROM agent_cases
  GROUP BY owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
),
closed_case_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    ac.owner_id,
    ac.case_id,
    ac.createddate,
    ac.closeddate,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ac.closeddate - ac.createddate))/3600.0 as handle_time_hours
  FROM agent_cases ac
  JOIN agents_with_multiple_cases amc ON ac.owner_id = amc.owner_id
  WHERE ac.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND ac.status ILIKE 'Closed%'
)
SELECT 
  owner_id as agent_id,
  COUNT(*) as closed_case_count,
  AVG(handle_time_hours) as avg_handle_time_hours
FROM closed_case_stats
GROUP BY owner_id
ORDER BY avg_handle_time_hours ASC
